title: Meraki wireless packet loss by network — 987654

annotations.description: Recorded per-network wireless packet-loss percentages from /organizations/{orgId}/wireless/devices/packetLoss/byNetwork — series labelled by network + direction (upstream / downstream / total). Meraki caps this endpoint at a one-day lookback, so recording it into Prometheus is the only path to longer-term WiFi-health dashboards.
annotations.summary: Wireless packet loss recorded for Meraki org 987654
